_meta.scope: P1 (1) from reports/SPEC_VS_BUILT_GAP.md — finance invoice signature lifecycle

title: P1(1) — complete the finance invoice lifecycle (issue / mark_partially_paid / void)
business_reason: Invoices could only be mark_paid + cancel because the transition generator's STATUS_ACTION map had no verbs for issued/partially_paid/voided. The real invoice workflow (draft -> issue -> partially_paid -> paid; void) was unreachable from the UI/API.
brain_skills: Skills: 04 Lifecycle/State Machine, 08 Security. Master loop: extend the generator map, regenerate, guards enforce from-states.

param_14.question: Generate the full invoice lifecycle action set.
param_14.answer: Added issued->issue (write), partially_paid->mark_partially_paid (write), voided->void (approve) to BOTH STATUS_ACTION maps (gen_modules service transitions + gen_ui page buttons — kept in sync). Regenerated: finance_ops now exposes issue/mark_partially_paid/mark_paid/void/cancel; gen_guards derives the correct from-states from workflows.json (issue from draft; mark_paid/partially_paid/void from issued; etc.). void is high-risk -> reason + danger-confirm + dual-approval. Blast radius is finance-only except results_ops candidate_result which also gains void (legitimate).
param_14.answer_source: spec/modules/finance_ops/workflows.json + lifecycle_states.json (the statuses already existed; only the verbs were missing)
param_14.security_implications: P0.1 guards constrain each new action to its valid from-states (e.g. cannot re-issue a paid invoice); void is dual-approval + reason.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: superseded->supersede deferred (broad — 22 entities); to be added carefully in a dedicated CR. mark_partially_paid amount checks (confirmed_payment_less_than_balance) are an UNMAPPED guard pending per-migration enums.
param_14.assumptions: the two STATUS_ACTION maps must stay in sync (noted as a consolidation follow-up).

principles_pass.P0.6: one map addition completes the lifecycle for finance (and any entity with these statuses)
principles_pass.P0.1-reuse: from-state enforcement via the guard pipeline
principles_pass.P1.6/P1.8: void is destructive -> confirm + reason + dual-approval

functional: guards: issue from draft, mark_partially_paid/void from issued, cannot re-issue a paid invoice (unit guards_app_wide 5/5)
regression: finance e2e green (chain4 mark_paid dual-approval, 07 adjustments); full unit + tsc clean
security_owasp: A01: invalid invoice-state transitions blocked; void dual-approval

verification: tsc clean; unit 166/166 (guards_app_wide 5/5); finance e2e 3/3; drift clean.

known_followups.supersede_verb: add superseded->supersede across the 22 entities carefully
known_followups.two_status_action_maps: consolidate gen_modules + gen_ui STATUS_ACTION into one source
known_followups.partial_payment_guard: map confirmed_payment_less_than_balance once finance enums are read
